igbo.metallic_fm_bell_tone: Ụda FM bell nke yiri ígwè
igbo.deep_808_style_sub_bass: Sub bass miri emi nke ụdị 808
igbo.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) hazichara harmony bebop. Usoro ya na-eji chords nke 6 kama nke 7 ma na-agbakwụnye diminished passing chords n'etiti ọkwa scale maka voice leading dị nro.
igbo.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: oge iru volume zuru oke. Decay: oge ịda ruo sustain. Sustain: ọkwa volume a na-ejide. Release: oge ịkpọnwụ mgbe ahapụchara key.
igbo.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale bụ ụyọkọ pitches ahaziri ahazi. Modes bụ ntụgharị nke scale nke na-amalite na ọkwa dị iche iche. Nke ọ bụla na-emepụta mmetụta dị iche.
igbo.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: A na-ewu chords site n'ịkwakọba intervals (nke 3). Major na-eji major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor na-atụgharị ha. Chords agbasaa na-agbakwụnye nke 7, nke 9, na karịa.
igbo.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks na-eji sine oscillator nwere pitch sweep. Snares na-agwakọta mkpọtụ (nzacha) + ahụ toni. Hi-hats na-eji mgbawa mkpọtụ a na-esite na high-pass zacha.
igbo.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = beats quarter-note 4 kwa bar (nke kachasị). 3/4 = mmetụta waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 na 7/8 na-emepụta grooves na-adịghị anọ n'otu, nke mba ọzọ.
igbo.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: A haziri keys site na 5ths na-arịgo n'ụzọ elekere. Keys agbata obi na-ekekọrịta notes 6 n'ime 7. Ịga n'ụzọ elekere na-agbakwụnye sharps; ọzọ na-agbakwụnye flats.
igbo.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Ụda egwu ọ bụla nwere overtones n'elu ntọala. Ike ha dị iche na-ekpebi timbre — nke a mere trumpet ji ada iche na flute na otu pitch.
igbo.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval bụ anya dị n'etiti pitches abụọ, a na-atụ ya na semitones. Ọnụ ọgụgụ frequency na-ekpebi consonance (ọnụ ọgụgụ dị mfe dị ka 3:2 na-ada nro).
igbo.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Na-akpọ notes chord otu otu n'usoro. Elu = site n'ala gaa n'elu, Ala = site n'elu gaa n'ala. Na-emepụta patterns na-eru site na chords kwụsiri ike.
igbo.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter na-ewepụ frequencies dị n'elu (lowpass), n'okpuru (highpass), ma ọ bụ gburugburu (bandpass) cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) na-abawanye frequencies dị nso na cutoff, na-emepụta elu.
igbo.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: mgbanwe volume oge ụfọdụ (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: mgbanwe pitch oge ụfọdụ (frequency modulation). A na-eji LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator) achịkwa ha abụọ.
igbo.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Achọpụtara ya na 1983. Mgbawa mkpọtụ na-abanye n'ime delay line dị mkpụmkpụ nke nwere feedback. Oge delay na-ekpebi pitch. Filter dị na feedback loop na-achịkwa ìhè na ịkpọnwụ. Ọ na-eṅomi eriri a dọtara n'ụzọ okike.
igbo.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer bụ ngwa ederede egwu. Nzọụkwụ ọ bụla na-anọchite anya nkewa beat. Ahịrị melody na-edozi notes nwere pitch, drums na-agbakwụnye rhythm. Notation egwu na-egosi ihe ị na-emepụta.
igbo.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Notes dị na ahịrị na oghere na-anọchite anya pitches. A na-egosi ogologo oge site n'ụdị note: zuru oke (○), ọkara (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), nke asatọ (♪). Staff na-eji ahịrị 5.
igbo.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: notes 12 kwa octave, ọnụ ọgụgụ 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier nke Bach (1722) mere ka ụwa kwenye na nkwekọrịta a. Note ọ bụla ị na-akpọ ebe a na-ebi na grid ahụ.
igbo.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) na-esite na ntụgharị pattern interval nke major-scale.
igbo.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (semitones 4+3), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). Chord nke 7 na-agbakwụnye third ọzọ. Egwu pop = chords ~6 na-emegharị; jazz na-eji extensions na substitutions.
igbo.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Chord textures na-adịgide — ntọala nke dị n'okpuru ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ egwu ihe nkiri ọ bụla. Nwalee iv-V-i na minor, ma ọ bụ i-VI-VII maka mmetụta Hans Zimmer ahụ. Drones na fifths na-akwado ọdịnala egwu ọdịnala India na bagpipe.
igbo.beat_pad_sample_based_drums: Beat Pad — drums dabere na sample
igbo.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Ọtụtụ egwu ama ama nọ na 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (mmetụta half-time). Kick na 1+3, snare na 2+4 = backbeat — ntọala rock + pop.
igbo.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 TOA) chọpụtara consonance site na integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz gbasaara ya na 1862. Ụda = ebili mmiri mkpakọ; egwu = patterns anyị kwenyere ịkpọ mara mma.
igbo.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid zuru oke, strum plate, na voice presets
igbo.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Dọkpụrụ n'ofe strings ka ị strum!
igbo.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis na-eji otu oscillator (modulator) gbanwee frequency nke ọzọ (carrier) ngwa ngwa. Ọnụ ọgụgụ modulator:carrier na-ekpebi harmonic content. Ọnụ ọgụgụ dị mfe (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) na-emepụta harmonic tones. Ọnụ ọgụgụ mgbagwoju anya na-emepụta ụda ígwè, nke yiri mgbịrịgba, ma ọ bụ nke na-abụghị harmonic. Yamaha DX7 mere ka FM na-ewu ewu na 1983.
igbo.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw na-akwakọba ọtụtụ sawtooth oscillators nke a detune ntakịrị site na ibe ha. Nke a na-emepụta nnukwu ụda sara mbara, na-egbukepụ — akara EDM, trance, na pop nke oge a. Voices karịa = ụda gbara ọkpụrụkpụ mana na-eji CPU karịa. Detuning na-achịkwa ka voices si dị anya na tuning — detune karịa = sara mbara/dị ka chorus, ntakịrị = kpọmkwem/gbadoro anya.
igbo.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator na-akpọ notes nke chord otu otu n'usoro. "Up" na-esite n'ala gaa n'elu, na-emepụta ike na-arịgo. "Down" na-agbada maka mmetụta ọdịda mmiri. Ọsọ na-achịkwa ọsọ (ntakịrị = ọsọ ọsọ). Gate na-achịkwa ogologo oge note ọ bụla na-ada (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Nwalee ọsọ=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern maka classic trance arp!
igbo.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Bụọ abụ, kwuo okwu, ma ọ bụ kpọọ ngwa egwu — nụ effects ozugbo!
igbo.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Otú Effects si Agbanwe Ebili Ụda
igbo.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Na-ewepụ frequencies dị n'elu (lowpass) ma ọ bụ n'okpuru (highpass) oke. Dị ka mkpuchi ọnụ gị aka — na-ewepụ high frequencies, na-eme ka ụda dị "gbara ọchịchịrị."
igbo.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Na-emepụta mkpughe site n'idepụta signal ma kpọọ ya ọzọ mgbe obere oge gasịrị. Feedback na-achịkwa ọnụọgụ mkpughe na-emegharị.
igbo.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Na-eṅomi acoustics ọnụ ụlọ site n'imepụta ọtụtụ puku obere mkpughe na-agwakọta ọnụ. Obere ọnụ ụlọ = reverb mkpụmkpụ, katidral = reverb ogologo.
igbo.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Na-ebipụ elu waveform, na-atụgharị sine waves dị nro ka ọ bụrụ ọdịdị siri ike, nwere nkuku. Nke a na-agbakwụnye harmonics ọhụrụ na-adịghị na ụda mbụ.
igbo.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Na-edepụta signal na obere delay na-agbanwe mgbe niile. Nke a na-eṅomi ọtụtụ voices/ngwa egwu na-akpọ ọnụ na obere oge dị iche.
igbo.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Na-agbanwe volume elu na ala ngwa ngwa, na-emepụta mmetụta na-akụ. Ọ na-adịkarị na surf guitar na egwu organ.
igbo.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Jiri headphones mgbe ị na-elekọta ka ị zere feedback loops! Mic na-agafe effects niile dị n'elu (filter, delay, reverb, wdg) — dozie ha ka ị nụ ka nke ọ bụla si agbanwe olu gị ma ọ bụ ngwa egwu gị.
igbo.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Jikọọ microphone gị ka ị mee ka olu gị ma ọ bụ ngwa egwu gị gafee n'ime effects chain ozugbo.
igbo.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Hụ olu gị dị ka waveform + frequency spectrum. Nụrụ ka filter, delay, reverb, distortion, na chorus si agbanwe ebili ụda n'anụ ahụ.
igbo.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Metụ & dọkpụrụ — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
igbo.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad na-edozi ọnọdụ mkpịsị aka/mouse gị na parameters egwu ozugbo. Axis X na-achịkwa pitch (aka ekpe = ala, aka nri = elu). Axis Y na-achịkwa filter cutoff frequency (elu = ìhè, ala = ọchịchịrị). Nke a yiri ngwa egwu dị ka Korg Kaoss Pad, nke gbanwere egwu eletrọnịkị ndụ site n'ịtụgharị gestures 2D ka ọ bụrụ ụda.
igbo.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Aka ekpe-aka nri bụ pitch, elu-ala bụ ìhè filter. Jiri arrow keys megharịa ma kpọọ note; pịa Escape ma ọ bụ Space ịkwụsị.
igbo.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & ọzọ →
igbo.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Pịa cells itinye notes — visual melody editor
igbo.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions ndị a na-ahụkarị — pịa ịnụ
igbo.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions na-emepụta njem mmetụta. Chord I (tonic) na-adị ka 'ụlọ.' Chord V (dominant) na-emepụta nrụgide chọrọ ịlaghachi na I. Chord vi (relative minor) na-agbakwụnye mwute ma ọ bụ omimi. Chord IV (subdominant) na-esi n'ụlọ pụọ nway. A na-atụ anya na progression I-V-vi-IV na-apụta n'ihe karịrị 70% nke abụ pop n'ihi na ọ na-eweta mmetụta ndị a n'usoro zuru oke.
igbo.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Ọnụọgụ Rome (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) na-anọchite anya ọkwa scale. Mkpụrụedemede ukwu = chord major. Mkpụrụedemede nta = chord minor.
igbo.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Tinye melody notes na grid dị n'elu ↑
igbo.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Pịa melody cells na grid dị n'elu ịhụ notation ebe a
igbo.held_for_a_full_bar: Ejidere ya maka bar zuru oke
igbo.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Pịa "Maa m aṅ!" ịmega rhythm patterns
igbo.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Bulite faịlụ WAV/MP3 maka custom pads. Samples na-ehichapụ mgbe emelitere ibe.
igbo.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Jikọọ patterns ka ọ bụrụ abụ zuru oke
igbo.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Tinye pattern ugbu a dị ka akụkụ
igbo.add_current_as_section: + Tinye Nke Ugbu a dị ka Akụkụ
igbo.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Mepụta drum pattern na grid dị n'elu, wee pịa "+ Tinye Nke Ugbu a dị ka Akụkụ" ịmalite iwu abụ.
igbo.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Akụkụ: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
igbo.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Enweghị beats echekwara ma. Mepụta pattern ma pịa Chekwaa!
igbo.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad na-emepụta tones dị ọkụ, dị ọcha site n'ịgwakọta sine na triangle waves. Họrọ voice, họrọ chord site na grid dị n'okpuru, wee strum plate!
igbo.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — pịa ịhọrọ, Space ịstrum
igbo.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — pịa ma ọ bụ dọkpụrụ gafee
igbo.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Nụrụ, hụ waveform, ma mụta akụkọ ngwa egwu ọ bụla
igbo.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Otú a ka ngwa egwu dị iche iche si enweta ụda pụrụ iche ha! Flute bụ ọtụtụ harmonic 1 (sine). Clarinet nwere odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin nwere harmonics niile. Pịa iwu timbre nke gị!
igbo.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis na-emepụta ụda eriri a dọtara nke ezigbo site n'iji obere mgbawa mkpọtụ zigara na delay line nwere filtered feedback. Dozie ìhè (agba mkpọtụ mbụ) na damping (ogologo sustain) ịhazi àgwà eriri.
igbo.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Chọpụta note ọ bụla na melody notes 4:
igbo.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: Harmonics elu siri ike — na-amanye / na-egbuke.
igbo.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Ntọala dị arọ, high dị nro. Dị ka acoustic.
igbo.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Etiti dị arọ na-enweghị ntọala — dị ka osisi/cuckoo flute.
igbo.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ ntọala dị ọcha — kpuchiri / dị ka sub.
igbo.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics fọrọ ịha nhata — timbre zuru oke / okike.
igbo.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Dozie ọkwa harmonic nke fundamental, mid, na high. Widget na-ekewa otu n'ime timbres ise dị iche iche. Enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe — kpụgharịa ma hụ.
igbo.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Echiche (ederede efu): Kedu ọkwa harmonic na-ekpebi "ìhè" vs "ọkụ"?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ị rapaara — gosi prompts mepere emepe
igbo.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Jide sliders abụọ kwụsie ike. Kpụọ otu. Lelee.
igbo.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Chọta ntọala abụọ na-emepụta otu timbre. Kedu ọnụọgụ ha na-ekekọrịta?
igbo.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Ezigbo ngwa egwu nwere spectra pụrụ iche. Nyochaa ihe mere flute ji ada iche na violin.
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke m
igbo.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Kọwaa ka harmonic content si ekpebi nghọta timbre.
igbo.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Ndetu imewe: discrete 5-class timbre marker; enweghị akara ntụkwasị obi ụda; enweghị nkpughe — na-akpaghị ma.
igbo.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: iji okwu ọ bụla dị mfe na ahịrịokwu dị mkpirikpi, na-enweghị jargon
igbo.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: maka nwa akwụkwọ klas 5, dị mkpirikpi ma nwee enyi
igbo.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: maka nwa akwụkwọ maara ụfọdụ music theory
igbo.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Pịa "Kọwaa" ka AI tutor kọwaa ihe view a na-akụzi na ọkwa ọgụgụ ị họọrọ.
igbo.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Ihe mere ngwa egwu ji ada iche
